sections.instruction: Choose the correct letter A, B or C for Questions 11-15. Label the plan below for Questions 16-20. Write the correct letter A-I next to questions 16-20.

questions.content: On Monday what will be the students’ working day?
While working in the museum students are encouraged to wear
options: A formal clothing such as a suit
B cap with the museum logo

questions.content: If students are ill or going to be late they must inform
The most popular task while on work placement is usually
options: A making presentations in local primary schools
B talking to elderly people in care homes
C conducting workshops in the museum

questions.content: The best form of preparation before starting their work placement is to read
options: A the history of the museum on the website
B the museum regulations and safety guidance
C notes made by previous work placement students

sections.instruction: For Questions 21-26, choose FIVE answers from the box, and write the correct letter, A-H, next to questions 21-26. For Questions 27-28 and 29-30, choose TWO letters, A-E.
sections.passage_or_context: Tutor’s opinion: A It would be very rewarding for the student. B It is too ambitious. C It would be difficult to evaluate. D It wouldn’t be sufficiently challenging. E It would involve extra costs. F It is beyond the student’s current ability. G It is already being done by another student. H It would probably have the greatest impact on the company.

questions.content: Mainly lives in {{BLANK}} but can also be seen in urban areas, e.g. parks.
